hypothesis: If scientific articles are processed end-to-end using a single-agent pipeline that preserves document structure with marker-pdf SDK and integrates GPT-4o image captioning followed by GPT-4.1/GPT-5/GPT-OSS-20b extraction, then the pipeline will achieve higher precision, recall, and F1 for schema-aligned chemical information extraction and better output-format compliance than baseline GPT models, a general-purpose ChatGPT agent, and existing domain-specific multi-agent systems because structured text preservation and integrated multimodal handling improve information retrieval and adherence to extraction rules.
